active_work.text: Takeover queue update: PRs #474, #605, and #606 are merged after fresh 3-OS R-CMD-check; stale bridge wrappers #520, #522, #523, #527, #528, #530, #532, and #534 are closed as superseded by current main; #540 is closed as an unsupported failed optimizer-control slice; #571 and #573 are closed as superseded drafts; #574, #475, and #473 remain paused draft PRs that need separate current-main refresh decisions.
